{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Noroloth’s castle
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The inside of [[Noroloth’s castle]] was ravaged by a battle against a [[Monarch]] intruder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
